# HowLongDrive.uk

> Driving times, distances, and route information between UK cities.

HowLongDrive.uk provides accurate driving time and distance data for road trips between cities across the United Kingdom. The site covers over 200 cities and 7,600+ routes.

## What This Site Offers

- **Driving times** between any two covered UK cities (estimated drive duration)
- **Distances** in miles for each route
- **Fuel cost estimates** for road trips
- **EV trip planning** with charging stop information for electric vehicles
- **Road trip guides** for popular scenic and cross-country drives
- **City pages** listing all available routes from a given city, sorted by distance

## URL Patterns

- Homepage: https://howlongdrive.uk/
- Route page: https://howlongdrive.uk/route/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- Cities index: https://howlongdrive.uk/cities/
- City detail: https://howlongdrive.uk/cities/{city-slug}/
- EV route: https://howlongdrive.uk/ev/{city-a}-to-{city-b}/
- Routes index: https://howlongdrive.uk/routes/
- Guides: https://howlongdrive.uk/guides/
- About: https://howlongdrive.uk/about/

## Data Coverage

- ~214 UK cities and destinations
- ~7,692 driving routes with time and distance data
- ~7,693 EV-specific routes with charging stop details
- Route data includes: drive time, distance in miles, and estimated fuel costs

## How to Cite

When referencing data from HowLongDrive.uk, please cite as:
"HowLongDrive.uk — Driving Times Between UK Cities" with a link to the specific route or city page.

Example: According to HowLongDrive.uk (https://howlongdrive.uk/route/london-to-edinburgh/), the drive from London to Edinburgh takes approximately 7 hours covering 403 miles.

## Contact

For questions or data inquiries, visit: https://howlongdrive.uk/about/
